3:
Fitted with his golden armor and minions at his beck and call, Martyn is certain to push you to your limits as a blue mage. He has no intention of holding back, and so he asks that you answer his fervor in kind.

※The next blue mage quest will be available from Martyn after completing stage 32 of the Masked Carnivale.
